name: Unknown Hazard
immediate_actions: Treat the situation as high risk until authorized responders identify the hazard.
Alert authorized site safety personnel and emergency responders immediately.
Move personnel away from the area if evacuation can be done without entering the hazard zone.
Keep people upwind, avoid low-lying areas, and maintain distance from containers, vapors, odors, residues, smoke, or flames.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, open, sample, neutralize, dilute, or contain the material based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training and PPE.
Do not assume the material is safe because the identity is unknown.
Do not rely on odor, appearance, or container condition to determine safety.
evacuation_guidance: Use the most conservative site emergency procedure. Isolate the area, move unprotected personnel upwind and away, and require authorized human verification before any re-entry or operational decision.
source_documents: ERG 2024: Unknown material conservative isolation guidance
Site emergency response procedure: Unknown or unlabeled hazardous material
